forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+description: 'Make the llama-agent fire Claude Code-compatible hooks. The hook engine already exists in agent-client-protocol-extras (HookConfig + HookableAgent + command/prompt/agent handlers with Claude exit-code/JSON semantics); this project (a) adds a loader that reads the real .claude/settings.json chain and extracts the bare `hooks` key, (b) wires HookableAgent into the llama ACP server lifecycle at real seams, (c) closes matcher + tool-name fidelity gaps, (d) backs prompt/agent hooks with the llama model as a HookEvaluator, and (e) makes PreToolUse truly block. Scope: bare settings.json hooks only — NO plugin hooks, NO managed-policy file. Full handler support (command + prompt + agent). PreToolUse blocks at the real tool-dispatch seam.'
+name: Claude-compatible Hooks in llama-agent
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,2 +0,0 @@
-description: 'Make the llama-agent fire Claude Code-compatible hooks. The hook engine already exists in agent-client-protocol-extras (HookConfig + HookableAgent + command/prompt/agent handlers with Claude exit-code/JSON semantics); this project (a) adds a loader that reads the real .claude/settings.json chain and extracts the bare `hooks` key, (b) wires HookableAgent into the llama ACP server lifecycle at real seams, (c) closes matcher + tool-name fidelity gaps, (d) backs prompt/agent hooks with the llama model as a HookEvaluator, and (e) makes PreToolUse truly block. Scope: bare settings.json hooks only — NO plugin hooks, NO managed-policy file. Full handler support (command + prompt + agent). PreToolUse blocks at the real tool-dispatch seam.'
-name: Claude-compatible Hooks in llama-agent
